data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: YouTube utilizes a microservices architecture to enhance scalability and manageability of different components.
data.technical_spec: Decomposed monolithic applications into several independent services which communicate over an API.

data.title: Content Delivery Network (CDN)
data.description: CDNs are employed to efficiently deliver videos, ensuring faster load times globally.
data.technical_spec: Implemented with global edge servers caching content closer to users.

data.title: Data Center Load Balancing
data.description: Distributes user requests across various data centers to optimize performance.
data.technical_spec: Uses algorithms to direct traffic based on load, proximity, and availability.

data.title: RESTful API
data.description: APIs facilitate interaction between the platform and third-party applications.
data.technical_spec: Follows REST principles using stateless architecture for API calls.

data.title: Database Sharding
data.description: Employs sharding to partition large databases to improve performance and manageability.
data.technical_spec: Horizontally partitions data to distribute the load across multiple servers.
